title: Layout Template System
text: Layout Template System The layout template system provides a centralized mechanism for generating consistent initial HTML content—including <head> sections, scripts, and document structure—for DSP applications. This allows common elements to be managed in one location while individual DSPs contribute their specific content. For more information on how to use the layout template system in DSP components, see Layout Mode Property and Customizing Layout Template . Related Links Layout Mode Property The Layout Mode property is a component-level setting that determines how a DSP’s layout content is processed during HTML generation. It controls the interaction between custom HTML and the layout template system. Customizing Layout Template The layout template system provides a centralized mechanism for controlling the HTML structure of DSP applications. When a DSP request is processed, USYSHTTP invokes DSP.HANDLER->genResponse(), which calls the USYSHTTP_LAYOUT::GETHTMLLAYOUT global ProcScript library to generate the final HTML output.
